title: Component
description: Real library instances showing all variants plus themed component comparison across Actian, Studio, and Explorer

sections.variantAxes: List ALL variant axes from the component set. Common axes: Type, State, Size, Style. Never omit axes even if they have only 2 values.
sections.variantMatrix: Rows = primary axis (usually Type or Style), columns = secondary axis (usually State). Must include EVERY variant combination — never truncate. If the matrix would exceed 8 columns, split into multiple rows per primary axis value.
sections.themeVariant: Variant name to display in the theme comparison (usually State=Default). The script automatically renders this variant in all 3 themes (Actian, Studio, Explorer) using real variable mode switching.

qualityRules: variantMatrix must include ALL variants — count them against the Figma component set and verify none are missing
variantName strings must exactly match Figma variant names (e.g., 'Type=Primary, State=Default')
Every variantAxes entry must have a complete values array — no truncation with '...' or 'etc'
themeVariant should use the Default state to show baseline appearance across themes
